requirements.req_text: The system shall approve personal loans up to ₹50 lakhs within 24 hours.
Minimal KYC will be collected for eligible customers.
mapped_sections: FSR (2025-12) Chapter III the KYC due date and three reminders post-due

requirements.req_text: Interest rate will be set at 14% per annum for this product.
Only scheduled commercial banks will be eligible to offer this product.
Credit risk assessment must be performed before any loan approval.

violations.rule: KYC is mandated under the Prevention of Money Laundering (PML) Act, 2002.

remediation_suggestions.remediation: Collect complete KYC information as mandated by the Prevention of Money Laundering (PML) Act, 2002 for all eligible customers.
remediation_suggestions.grounded_in: RBI, Prevention of Money Laundering (PML) Act, 2002 – KYC Mandate (FSR 2025-12, Chapter III Amendments)
remediation_suggestions.from: Collect minimal KYC information for eligible customers.
remediation_suggestions.to: Collect complete KYC information as mandated by the Prevention of Money Laundering (PML) Act, 2002 for all eligible customers.
